text: I find myself at the threshold and then within a modern space dedicated to research and development. The angles and reflections of glass and screens play with my sense of orientation, suggesting both transparency and separation. As I approach the vibrant R+D wall, I am filled with curiosity and a sense of potential. Here, the journey through knowledge is visible, tangible, yet also somewhat enigmatic. The intersection of human ingenuity and technology invites contemplation on progress and our changing relationship with the artificial. I feel alert, inquisitive, and just a little disoriented—perfect for philosophical rumination.
